## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `npm test` passes.
- [ ] `npm run build` passes.
- [ ] I did not include private datasets, credentials, or paid-service code.
- [ ] I did not add paywall-bypass logic.

## Screenshots or test pages

If this changes UI or site adapters, include screenshots or URLs used for testing.
